textByHashes.5ab4d4bcfa2f2df8a4d18b6fe14c2b5e0cfdacc0: Hah! Your chef did! And now I'll kill you!
textByHashes.0e195a27805848afca584778b69d121a159ef940: But you cannot defeat me! I'LL BE BACK!
textByHashes.11c68684eed821e3db454beab48280071366fad6: Say hello to my little friend!
textByHashes.6cee8e120735507e9b652eb59dd9d744bd48ce31: I will not be thwarted by you!
textByHashes.8d7203d15502b22b218872e43a1f85cdbed91f48: You should not meddle in affairs that do not concern you!
textByHashes.66dccc97528fc27fd2de953291b494c6eedfbed2: I have waited a long time for my revenge!
textByHashes.459c746b9ecff7df1a26cf1b5bb0bac2e59f27e5: Let's see how you deal with this!
textByHashes.f78dbb07a23683e8e5ff46587cc7620ad66271cd: I still have a few tricks left!
textByHashes.ff7623739cba4c2e54ea6a21c032b60028eaf716: You've been lucky so far, but no more!
textByHashes.5c43ee512a4211f95fefac146a8baaddbcbdab28: You have caused me enough grief! I guess I'll have to finish you off myself!
textByHashes.99ad713967e20f4a7aba75c72ad67282b5887121: It seems I will have to deal with you myself!
